<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="ar" dir="rtl">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
<meta name="mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
<title>درر العقد الفريد – اللغة العربية</title>
<style>
@font-face {
  font-family: 'Amiri';
  font-weight: 400;
  font-style: normal;
  src: url('data:font/ttf;base64,') format('truetype');
}
@font-face {
  font-family: 'Amiri';
  font-weight: 700;
  font-style: normal;
  src: url('data:font/ttf;base64,') format('truetype');
}
@font-face {
  font-family: 'Tajawal';
  font-weight: 400;
  font-style: normal;
  src: url('data:font/ttf;base64,') format('truetype');
}
@font-face {
  font-family: 'Tajawal';
  font-weight: 700;
  font-style: normal;
  src: url('data:font/ttf;base64,') format('truetype');
}
:root{
  --gold:#c9973a;--gl:#f0c96a;--gd:#7a5c18;
  --navy:#0b1220;--navy2:#0e1828;
  --card:rgba(255,255,255,.05);--cb:rgba(201,151,58,.22);
  --txt:#e8f0fa;--mut:#6a8aaa;
  --blue:#2980b9;--green:#27ae60;--orange:#e67e22;--purple:#9b59b6;--red:#e74c3c;
}
*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
body{font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;background:var(--navy);color:var(--txt);min-height:100vh;overflow-x:hidden;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent}
::-webkit-scrollbar{width:4px}::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--gd);border-radius:4px}
::selection{background:rgba(201,151,58,.3)}

#cvs{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:0;pointer-events:none}
#app{position:relative;z-index:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;min-height:100vh}

/* TOP BAR */
#topbar{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:7px 16px;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;background:rgba(7,12,22,.88);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(201,151,58,.15);backdrop-filter:blur(14px);font-size:.78rem;position:sticky;top:0;z-index:50}
#clk{color:var(--gl);font-weight:700;font-size:.72rem}
.tb-c{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
#sc-pill{background:rgba(201,151,58,.12);border:1px solid rgba(201,151,58,.28);border-radius:20px;padding:3px 12px;color:var(--gold);font-weight:700;font-size:.75rem}
#tw{display:none;align-items:center;gap:5px}
.tsv{width:36px;height:36px;transform:rotate(-90deg)}
.tt{fill:none;stroke:rgba(255,255,255,.07);stroke-width:3}
.ta{fill:none;stroke:var(--gold);stroke-width:3;stroke-linecap:round;transition:stroke-dashoffset .95s linear,stroke .3s}
#tn{font-size:.78rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--gold);min-width:20px;text-align:center}
.tb-btns{display:flex;gap:5px}
.tb-btn{background:none;border:1px solid rgba(201,151,58,.22);border-radius:7px;padding:4px 9px;color:var(--gl);font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;font-size:.68rem;cursor:pointer;transition:.2s;white-space:nowrap}
.tb-btn:hover{background:rgba(201,151,58,.1)}

/* HERO */
#hero{text-align:center;padding:26px 18px 20px;position:relative}
#hero::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:8%;right:8%;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--gold),transparent);opacity:.3}
.ew{width:115px;height:115px;margin:0 auto 14px;position:relative;animation:flt 5s ease-in-out infinite}
@keyframes flt{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateY(-7px)}}
.eg{position:absolute;inset:-10px;border-radius:50%;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(201,151,58,.28) 0%,transparent 70%);animation:plse 3s ease-in-out infinite}
@keyframes plse{0%,100%{opacity:.4;transform:scale(1)}50%{opacity:.85;transform:scale(1.06)}}
.er1{position:absolute;inset:-3px;border-radius:50%;border:1.5px solid rgba(201,151,58,.55);animation:spn 9s linear infinite}
.er2{position:absolute;inset:-7px;border-radius:50%;border:1px solid rgba(201,151,58,.2);animation:spn 17s linear infinite reverse}
@keyframes spn{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}
.ec{width:115px;height:115px;border-radius:50%;overflow:hidden;position:relative;z-index:2;border:3px solid var(--gold);box-shadow:0 0 0 4px rgba(201,151,58,.12),0 6px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.7);background:#fff}
.ec img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center;display:block}
.off1{font-family:'Amiri',serif;font-size:.85rem;color:rgba(240,201,106,.7);margin-bottom:2px}
.off2{font-family:'Amiri',serif;font-size:.98rem;color:var(--gl);font-weight:700;margin-bottom:13px;text-shadow:0 0 18px rgba(201,151,58,.3)}
.scard{max-width:460px;margin:0 auto 16px;background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--cb);border-radius:15px;padding:14px 17px;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.scard::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;inset-x:0;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--gold),transparent);opacity:.45}
.scn{font-family:'Amiri',serif;color:var(--mut);font-size:.78rem;margin-bottom:10px}
.sg{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:7px;margin-bottom:8px}
.sc2{text-align:center;position:relative}
.sc2:first-child::after{content:'';position:absolute;left:0;top:5%;bottom:5%;width:1px;background:rgba(201,151,58,.2)}
.sll{font-size:.66rem;color:var(--mut);margin-bottom:2px}
.svv{font-family:'Amiri',serif;font-size:.96rem;color:var(--txt);font-weight:700}
.all{font-size:.66rem;color:var(--mut);margin-bottom:2px}
.avv{font-family:'Amiri',serif;font-size:1.05rem;color:var(--gl);font-weight:700}
.gt{font-family:'Amiri',serif;font-size:1.75rem;font-weight:700;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gl),var(--gold),#e0a840);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;line-height:1.3;margin-bottom:4px}
.gs{font-family:'Amiri',serif;font-size:.9rem;color:rgba(232,240,250,.55)}

/* MAIN */
#main{flex:1;max-width:880px;margin:0 auto;width:100%;padding:18px 13px 80px}
.scr{display:none;animation:fu .3s ease}
.scr.active{display:block}
@keyframes fu{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(14px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
.sh{font-family:'Amiri',serif;font-size:1.12rem;color:var(--gold);text-align:center;margin-bottom:5px}
.ss{text-align:center;color:var(--mut);font-size:.77rem;margin-bottom:16px;line-height:1.6}

/* LEVELS */
.lvg{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:11px;margin-bottom:10px}
@media(max-width:540px){.lvg{grid-template-columns:1fr;max-width:280px;margin-inline:auto}}
.lv{background:var(--card);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);border-radius:16px;padding:20px 12px 18px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:all .3s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1);position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.lv::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;inset-x:0;height:2px;background:var(--lc,var(--gold));opacity:.4;transition:.3s}
.lv:hover,.lv:active{transform:translateY(-6px) scale(1.02);border-color:rgba(201,151,58,.38);box-shadow:0 14px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.5)}
.lv:hover::before{opacity:1}
.lv-1{--lc:#27ae60}.lv-2{--lc:#2980b9}.lv-3{--lc:#f39c12}
.lvi{font-size:2.1rem;margin-bottom:8px;display:block}
.lvd{display:inline-block;font-size:.6rem;padding:2px 9px;border-radius:20px;background:rgba(201,151,58,.1);border:1px solid rgba(201,151,58,.18);color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:6px}
.lvn{font-family:'Amiri',serif;font-size:1rem;color:var(--gl);margin-bottom:5px}
.lvx{font-size:.7rem;color:var(--mut);line-height:1.5}
.lv-cats{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:3px;justify-content:center;margin-top:8px}
.lcp{font-size:.56rem;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:20px;border:1px solid;opacity:.75}
.lvs{margin-top:8px;font-size:.82rem;letter-spacing:3px}

/* CATEGORIES */
.bb{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;background:none;border:1px solid rgba(201,151,58,.22);border-radius:8px;padding:6px 12px;color:var(--gl);font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;font-size:.75rem;cursor:pointer;transition:.2s;margin-bottom:14px}
.bb:hover{background:rgba(201,151,58,.08)}
.cat-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:12px}
@media(max-width:470px){.cat-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
.cat-card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);border-radius:16px;padding:24px 16px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:all .3s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1);position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.cat-card::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;inset-x:0;height:3px;background:var(--cc,var(--gold));opacity:.45;transition:.3s}
.cat-card:hover,.cat-card:active{transform:translateY(-5px) scale(1.02);box-shadow:0 12px 36px rgba(0,0,0,.5)}
.cat-card:hover::before{opacity:1;height:4px}
.cat-icon{font-size:2.6rem;margin-bottom:9px;display:block}
.cat-name{font-family:'Amiri',serif;font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--txt);margin-bottom:4px}
.cat-desc{font-size:.71rem;color:var(--mut);line-height:1.5}
.cat-badge{display:inline-block;margin-top:8px;font-size:.6rem;background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);border-radius:20px;padding:2px 10px;color:rgba(232,240,250,.55)}
.lv-ind{position:absolute;top:9px;left:9px;font-size:.58rem;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:20px;background:rgba(201,151,58,.15);border:1px solid rgba(201,151,58,.28);color:var(--gl);font-weight:700}

/* QUESTION */
.qnv{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:7px}
.qcr{font-size:.72rem;color:var(--mut)}.qcr b{color:var(--gl)}
.pb{height:4px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);border-radius:10px;margin-bottom:14px;overflow:hidden}
.pf{height:100%;border-radius:10px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--pc1,#27ae60),var(--pc2,#c9973a));transition:width .5s}
.qc{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--cb);border-radius:16px;padding:22px 18px;margin-bottom:13px;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.qc::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;inset-x:0;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--gold),transparent);opacity:.35}
.qp{display:inline-block;padding:3px 11px;border-radius:20px;font-size:.66rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:10px}
.p-tf{background:rgba(39,174,96,.15);border:1px solid #27ae60;color:#27ae60}
.p-mc{background:rgba(41,128,185,.15);border:1px solid #2980b9;color:#5dade2}
.p-fi{background:rgba(230,126,34,.15);border:1px solid #e67e22;color:#f5b942}
.qt{font-family:'Amiri',serif;font-size:1.15rem;line-height:2;color:var(--txt);margin-bottom:13px}
.og{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:7px}
@media(max-width:420px){.og{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
.op{background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);border:1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);border-radius:10px;padding:11px 13px;text-align:right;cursor:pointer;font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;font-size:.86rem;color:var(--txt);transition:.18s;line-height:1.5}
.op:hover:not(:disabled),.op:active:not(:disabled){border-color:var(--gold);background:rgba(201,151,58,.07)}
.op.ok{background:rgba(39,174,96,.18);border-color:#27ae60;color:#7dcea0}
.op.no{background:rgba(231,76,60,.18);border-color:#e74c3c;color:#f1948a}
.op:disabled{cursor:default}
.tfr{display:flex;gap:11px;justify-content:center;margin-top:4px}
.tfb{flex:1;max-width:145px;padding:13px;border-radius:12px;border:2px solid;cursor:pointer;font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;font-size:.95rem;font-weight:900;transition:.2s;text-align:center}
.tft{background:rgba(39,174,96,.12);border-color:#27ae60;color:#27ae60}
.tff{background:rgba(231,76,60,.12);border-color:#e74c3c;color:#e74c3c}
.tfb:hover:not(:disabled){filter:brightness(1.4);transform:scale(1.05)}
.tfb.ok{filter:brightness(1.5);box-shadow:0 0 16px currentColor}
.tfb.no{opacity:.35}
.tfb:disabled{cursor:default}
.fw{margin-top:10px}
.fi{width:100%;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1.5px solid rgba(201,151,58,.22);border-radius:10px;padding:10px 13px;font-family:'Amiri',serif;font-size:1rem;color:var(--txt);outline:none;transition:.2s;text-align:right}
.fi:focus{border-color:var(--gold)}
.fi.ok{border-color:#27ae60;background:rgba(39,174,96,.07)}
.fi.no{border-color:#e74c3c;background:rgba(231,76,60,.07)}
.fsb{margin-top:8px;background:rgba(39,174,96,.15);border:1px solid rgba(39,174,96,.35);border-radius:9px;padding:8px 20px;color:#27ae60;font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;font-size:.84rem;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;transition:.2s}
.fsb:hover{border-color:#27ae60}
.fb{margin-top:10px;padding:11px 13px;border-radius:10px;font-size:.83rem;line-height:1.65;display:none;animation:fu .25s}
.fb.ok{background:rgba(39,174,96,.12);border:1px solid rgba(39,174,96,.35);color:#7dcea0}
.fb.no{background:rgba(231,76,60,.12);border:1px solid rgba(231,76,60,.35);color:#f1948a}
#nb{display:none;margin:11px auto 0;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gold),var(--gd));border:none;border-radius:10px;padding:9px 32px;color:#070d16;font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;font-size:.88rem;font-weight:900;cursor:pointer;transition:.2s}
#nb:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 5px 18px rgba(201,151,58,.38)}
.nc{text-align:center}

/* RESULTS */
.rc{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--cb);border-radius:19px;padding:30px 20px;max-width:440px;margin:0 auto;text-align:center}
.ri{font-size:2.6rem;margin-bottom:4px}
.rtt{font-family:'Amiri',serif;font-size:1.55rem;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:4px}
.rs{font-size:3.5rem;font-weight:900;line-height:1;margin:11px 0;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gl),#27ae60);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent}
.rst{font-size:1.3rem;letter-spacing:6px;margin:5px 0}
.ri2{color:var(--mut);font-size:.8rem;line-height:2.2;margin-bottom:14px}.ri2 b{color:var(--gl)}
.rb{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;justify-content:center}
.rg{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gold),var(--gd));border:none;border-radius:9px;padding:9px 18px;color:#070d16;font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;font-size:.82rem;font-weight:900;cursor:pointer;transition:.2s}
.rg:hover{transform:translateY(-2px)}
.ro{background:none;border:1px solid rgba(201,151,58,.3);border-radius:9px;padding:9px 18px;color:var(--gl);font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;font-size:.82rem;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;transition:.2s}
.ro:hover{background:rgba(201,151,58,.07)}

/* ABOUT */
#s-about{max-width:580px;margin:0 auto}
.about-card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--cb);border-radius:16px;padding:22px 18px;margin-bottom:12px;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.about-card::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;inset-x:0;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--gold),transparent);opacity:.4}
.abt-title{font-family:'Amiri',serif;font-size:1.05rem;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:10px}
.abt-row{display:flex;gap:9px;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:8px;font-size:.83rem;line-height:1.65;color:var(--mut)}
.abt-row b{color:var(--txt)}
.abt-icon{font-size:1.2rem;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:1px}
.steps-list{list-style:none;counter-reset:step}
.steps-list li{counter-increment:step;display:flex;gap:9px;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:9px;font-size:.81rem;color:var(--mut);line-height:1.6}
.steps-list li::before{content:counter(step);background:rgba(201,151,58,.15);border:1px solid rgba(201,151,58,.28);border-radius:50%;width:20px;height:20px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:var(--gold);font-weight:900;font-size:.7rem;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px}
.cat-list{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:7px;margin-top:7px}
@media(max-width:400px){.cat-list{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
.cat-item{background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);border-radius:9px;padding:9px 10px;font-size:.78rem}
.cat-item-icon{font-size:1.3rem;margin-bottom:2px}
.cat-item-name{color:var(--txt);font-weight:700}
.cat-item-desc{color:var(--mut);font-size:.68rem}
.about-back{margin:16px auto 0;display:block;padding:10px 26px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gold),var(--gd));color:#070d16;border:none;border-radius:10px;font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;font-weight:900;font-size:.88rem;cursor:pointer;transition:.2s}
.about-back:hover{transform:translateY(-2px)}

/* MODALS */
.ov{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(3,7,18,.9);z-index:1000;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:12px;backdrop-filter:blur(8px)}
.ov.open{display:flex}
.md{background:linear-gradient(150deg,#0c1828,#101e30);border:1px solid rgba(201,151,58,.28);border-radius:16px;padding:22px;max-width:560px;width:100%;max-height:90vh;overflow-y:auto}
.mdt{font-family:'Amiri',serif;font-size:1.3rem;color:var(--gold);text-align:center;margin-bottom:14px}
.mr{margin-bottom:12px}
.ml{font-size:.72rem;color:var(--gl);margin-bottom:4px;display:block}
.mi,.msel,.mta{width:100%;background:rgba(0,0,0,.3);border:1px solid rgba(201,151,58,.18);border-radius:7px;padding:8px 11px;color:var(--txt);font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;font-size:.81rem;text-align:right;outline:none}
.mta{min-height:58px;resize:vertical}
.mi:focus,.msel:focus,.mta:focus{border-color:var(--gold)}
.msel option{background:#0c1828}
.mbtn{background:rgba(39,174,96,.15);border:1px solid rgba(39,174,96,.3);border-radius:7px;padding:6px 13px;color:#27ae60;font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;font-size:.76rem;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;margin-left:6px;transition:.2s}
.mbtn:hover{border-color:#27ae60}
.mcl{background:rgba(231,76,60,.12);border:1px solid rgba(231,76,60,.32);border-radius:7px;padding:6px 13px;color:#f1948a;font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;font-size:.76rem;cursor:pointer}
.mdv{border:none;border-top:1px solid rgba(201,151,58,.1);margin:12px 0}
.stb{background:rgba(0,0,0,.2);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;font-size:.75rem;line-height:2;color:var(--mut);min-height:36px}.stb b{color:var(--gl)}
.pa{text-align:center;padding:7px 0}.pa p{color:var(--mut);font-size:.76rem;margin-bottom:9px}
.pa input{background:rgba(0,0,0,.3);border:1px solid rgba(201,151,58,.22);border-radius:7px;padding:8px 14px;color:var(--txt);font-size:.95rem;outline:none;text-align:center;letter-spacing:5px;width:135px}
.hl{list-style:none}
.hli{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;padding:8px 11px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(201,151,58,.07);font-size:.81rem}
.hr2{color:var(--gold);font-weight:900;width:22px;flex-shrink:0;text-align:center}
.hn{flex:1;color:var(--txt)}.hsc{color:#27ae60;font-weight:700}
.en{text-align:center;color:var(--mut);font-size:.76rem;padding:12px}

/* Certificate */
.cp{background:#fdf6ec;border:3px double #9a7010;border-radius:5px;padding:26px;max-width:510px;width:100%;font-family:'Amiri',serif;color:#180800;text-align:center;position:relative}
.cp::before,.cp::after{content:'';position:absolute;inset:7px;border:1px solid rgba(154,112,16,.2);border-radius:2px;pointer-events:none}
.ce{width:60px;height:60px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;margin:0 auto 6px;display:block;border:2px solid rgba(154,112,16,.35)}
.cauth{font-size:.65rem;color:#5a3400;margin-bottom:2px}
.ch{font-size:1.65rem;font-weight:700;color:#1a3800;margin:4px 0}
.cl2{border:none;border-top:2px solid rgba(154,112,16,.3);width:46%;margin:6px auto}
.cb2{font-size:.9rem;line-height:2;color:#280800;margin:6px 0}
.cname{font-size:1.25rem;font-weight:700;color:#1a3800;border-bottom:2px solid #c9973a;display:inline-block;padding:0 16px;margin:4px}
.csc{font-size:1rem;color:#1a3800;margin-top:5px}
.cdt{font-size:.68rem;color:#777;margin-top:10px}
.csig{display:flex;justify-content:space-around;margin-top:14px;font-size:.66rem;color:#444}
.csgl{border-top:1px solid #bbb;width:66px;margin:5px auto 2px}

/* FABs */
.fab{position:fixed;bottom:14px;border-radius:50px;padding:8px 13px;font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;font-size:.7rem;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;z-index:200;transition:.25s;box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.5)}
#fbt{left:12px;background:rgba(39,174,96,.15);border:1px solid rgba(39,174,96,.35);color:#27ae60}
#fbh{right:12px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gold),var(--gd));border:none;color:#070d16}
.fab:hover{transform:translateY(-3px)}

/* Confetti */
.cnf{position:fixed;top:-8px;z-index:9999;width:6px;height:6px;animation:cdf var(--d) linear forwards}
@keyframes cdf{to{top:110vh;transform:rotate(var(--r)) translateX(var(--x));opacity:0}}

/* Shake on timeout */
@keyframes shk{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}15%{transform:translateX(-10px)}30%{transform:translateX(10px)}45%{transform:translateX(-8px)}60%{transform:translateX(8px)}75%{transform:translateX(-4px)}90%{transform:translateX(4px)}}

/* Timer danger pulse */
@keyframes tdanger{0%,100%{transform:scale(1)}50%{transform:scale(1.3)}}
.timer-warn{animation:tdanger .5s ease-in-out infinite!important}
.timer-danger{animation:tdanger .3s ease-in-out infinite!important}

/* Correct answer flash */
@keyframes flashOk{0%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(39,174,96,.6)}100%{box-shadow:0 0 30px 15px rgba(39,174,96,0)}}
.flash-ok{animation:flashOk .6s ease-out}

/* Wrong answer flash */
@keyframes flashNo{0%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(231,76,60,.6)}100%{box-shadow:0 0 30px 15px rgba(231,76,60,0)}}
.flash-no{animation:flashNo .6s ease-out}

/* Score pop */
@keyframes scorePop{0%{transform:scale(1)}40%{transform:scale(1.4)}100%{transform:scale(1)}}
.score-pop{animation:scorePop .35s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1)}

/* Timer zone colors */
#tw.warn .ta{stroke:#f39c12!important}
#tw.warn #tn{color:#f39c12!important}
#tw.danger .ta{stroke:#e74c3c!important}
#tw.danger #tn{color:#e74c3c!important}
/* Timer background glow */
#tw{border-radius:8px;padding:3px 5px;transition:background .5s}
#tw.warn{background:rgba(243,156,18,.1)}
#tw.danger{background:rgba(231,76,60,.15);animation:tdanger .5s ease-in-out infinite}

/* Security */
#dw{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;background:#070d16;z-index:99999;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-direction:column;gap:12px;font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif}
#dw.show{display:flex}

@media print{#topbar,#fbt,#fbh,.ov:not(#m-cert){display:none!important}}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div id="dw">
  <div style="font-size:2.6rem">🔒</div>
  <div style="font-size:1.25rem;color:#e74c3c;font-family:'Amiri',serif">تم إيقاف اللعبة</div>
  <div style="color:#6a8aaa;font-size:.82rem">لا يمكن التشغيل مع فتح أدوات المطور</div>
</div>

<canvas id="cvs"></canvas>
<div id="app">

<div id="topbar">
  <div id="clk">⏰ ...</div>
  <div class="tb-c">
    <div id="tw">
      <svg class="tsv" viewBox="0 0 38 38">
        <circle class="tt" cx="19" cy="19" r="15"/>
        <circle class="ta" id="ta" cx="19" cy="19" r="15" stroke-dasharray="94.2" stroke-dashoffset="0"/>
      </svg>
      <div id="tn">120</div>
    </div>
    <div id="sc-pill">🏅 <span id="sv">0</span> نقطة</div>
  </div>
  <div class="tb-btns">
    <button class="tb-btn" onclick="toggleSound()" id="snd-btn">🔇 الأصوات</button>
    <button class="tb-btn" onclick="show('s-about')">ℹ️ عن اللعبة</button>
  </div>
</div>

<div id="hero">
  <div class="ew">
    <div class="eg"></div><div class="er1"></div><div class="er2"></div>
    <div class="ec"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="نسر فلسطين"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="off1">وزارة التربية والتعليم العالي</div>
  <div class="off2">مديرية التربية والتعليم – جنوب الخليل</div>
  <div class="scard">
    <div class="scn">مدرسة ذكور بيت عوا الثانوية</div>
    <div class="sg">
      <div class="sc2"><div class="sll">مدير المدرسة</div><div class="svv">أ. مؤيد سويطي</div></div>
      <div class="sc2"><div class="sll">المشرف التربوي</div><div class="svv">أ. موسى فرج الله</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="all">إعداد وتقديم</div>
    <div class="avv">أ. خليل محمد خليل عطيلة</div>
  </div>
  <div class="gt">درر العقد الفريد في اللغة العربية</div>
  <div class="gs">الصف الخامس — الفصل الثاني</div>
</div>

<div id="main">

  <!-- WELCOME -->
  <div class="scr active" id="s-welcome">
    <div class="sh" style="margin-top:5px">✨ اختر مستوى الصعوبة</div>
    <div class="ss">4 أقسام × 5 أسئلة = 20 سؤالاً | ⏱ دقيقتان لكل سؤال</div>
    <div class="lvg">
      <div class="lv lv-1" onclick="pickLevel(1)">
        <span class="lvi">🌱</span><div class="lvd">مبتدئ</div>
        <div class="lvn">المستوى الأول</div>
        <div class="lvx">صح وخطأ، اختيار متعدد</div>
        <div class="lv-cats">
          <span class="lcp" style="border-color:#2980b9;color:#5dade2">📖 فهم</span>
          <span class="lcp" style="border-color:#27ae60;color:#7dcea0">📐 نحو</span>
          <span class="lcp" style="border-color:#e67e22;color:#f5b942">✏️ إملاء</span>
          <span class="lcp" style="border-color:#9b59b6;color:#c39bd3">✨ شعر</span>
        </div>
        <div class="lvs">⭐</div>
      </div>
      <div class="lv lv-2" onclick="pickLevel(2)">
        <span class="lvi">📘</span><div class="lvd">متوسط</div>
        <div class="lvn">المستوى الثاني</div>
        <div class="lvx">أملأ الفراغ، مرادف ومضاد</div>
        <div class="lv-cats">
          <span class="lcp" style="border-color:#2980b9;color:#5dade2">📖 فهم</span>
          <span class="lcp" style="border-color:#27ae60;color:#7dcea0">📐 نحو</span>
          <span class="lcp" style="border-color:#e67e22;color:#f5b942">✏️ إملاء</span>
          <span class="lcp" style="border-color:#9b59b6;color:#c39bd3">✨ شعر</span>
        </div>
        <div class="lvs">⭐⭐</div>
      </div>
      <div class="lv lv-3" onclick="pickLevel(3)">
        <span class="lvi">🏆</span><div class="lvd">متقدم</div>
        <div class="lvn">المستوى الثالث</div>
        <div class="lvx">فوازير، تحليل، استنتاج</div>
        <div class="lv-cats">
          <span class="lcp" style="border-color:#2980b9;color:#5dade2">📖 فهم</span>
          <span class="lcp" style="border-color:#27ae60;color:#7dcea0">📐 نحو</span>
          <span class="lcp" style="border-color:#e67e22;color:#f5b942">✏️ إملاء</span>
          <span class="lcp" style="border-color:#9b59b6;color:#c39bd3">✨ شعر</span>
        </div>
        <div class="lvs">⭐⭐⭐</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <p style="text-align:center;color:var(--mut);font-size:.68rem;margin-top:8px">🔐 لوحة المعلم: أسفل اليسار &nbsp;|&nbsp; 🏆 الشرف: أسفل اليمين</p>
  </div>

  <!-- CATEGORIES -->
  <div class="scr" id="s-cats">
    <button class="bb" onclick="goHome()">← الرئيسية</button>
    <div class="sh">اختر القسم — <span id="lv-lbl">المستوى 1</span></div>
    <div class="ss" style="margin-bottom:14px">كل قسم يحتوي على 5 أسئلة</div>
    <div class="cat-grid" id="cat-grid"></div>
  </div>

  <!-- QUESTION -->
  <div class="scr" id="s-question">
    <div class="qnv">
      <button class="bb" style="margin:0" onclick="goCats()">← الأقسام</button>
      <div class="qcr"><b id="cr-cat">القسم</b> | سؤال <b id="cr-n">1</b> من <b id="cr-t">5</b></div>
    </div>
    <div class="pb"><div class="pf" id="pf" style="width:0%"></div></div>
    <div class="qc">
      <span class="qp" id="qp">اختيار</span>
      <div class="qt" id="qt"></div>
      <div id="qo"></div>
      <div class="fb" id="qfb"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="nc"><button id="nb" onclick="nextQ()">التالي ←</button></div>
  </div>

  <!-- RESULTS -->
  <div class="scr" id="s-results">
    <div class="rc">
      <div class="ri" id="ri">🦅</div>
      <div class="rtt" id="rtt">أحسنت!</div>
      <div class="rs"><span id="rpct">0</span>%</div>
      <div class="rst" id="rstr"></div>
      <div class="ri2">صحيح: <b id="rcor">0</b>/<b id="rtot">5</b> &nbsp;|&nbsp; النقاط: <b id="rpts">0</b><br>القسم: <b id="rcat">-</b></div>
      <div class="rb">
        <button class="rg" onclick="showCert()">🏅 شهادة</button>
        <button class="ro" onclick="goCats()">← قسم آخر</button>
        <button class="ro" onclick="goHome()">🏠 الرئيسية</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ABOUT -->
  <div class="scr" id="s-about">
    <button class="bb" onclick="goHome()">← الرئيسية</button>
    <div class="sh">ℹ️ عن اللعبة</div>
    <div class="about-card">
      <div class="abt-title">🎯 لماذا هذه اللعبة؟</div>
      <div class="abt-row"><span class="abt-icon">🌟</span><span>لعبة تعليمية تفاعلية تُراعي الفروق الفردية — اللغة العربية الصف الخامس الفصل الثاني.</span></div>
      <div class="abt-row"><span class="abt-icon">🏫</span><span><b>المدرسة:</b> مدرسة ذكور بيت عوا الثانوية — جنوب الخليل</span></div>
      <div class="abt-row"><span class="abt-icon">👨‍🏫</span><span><b>إعداد:</b> أ. خليل محمد خليل عطيلة</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="about-card">
      <div class="abt-title">📚 أقسام اللعبة</div>
      <div class="cat-list">
        <div class="cat-item"><div class="cat-item-icon">📖</div><div class="cat-item-name">فهم المقروء</div><div class="cat-item-desc">الجذور وعرس ثلجي</div></div>
        <div class="cat-item"><div class="cat-item-icon">📐</div><div class="cat-item-name">النحو والقواعد</div><div class="cat-item-desc">الضمة والفتحة والكسرة</div></div>
        <div class="cat-item"><div class="cat-item-icon">✏️</div><div class="cat-item-name">الإملاء</div><div class="cat-item-desc">النون والتنوين وألف المد</div></div>
        <div class="cat-item"><div class="cat-item-icon">✨</div><div class="cat-item-name">النص الشعري</div><div class="cat-item-desc">قصيدة الثلج – فوّاز حجّو</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="about-card">
      <div class="abt-title">🕹️ كيف تلعب؟</div>
      <ul class="steps-list">
        <li>اختر مستوى الصعوبة</li>
        <li>اختر القسم المراد التدرب عليه</li>
        <li>أجب على 5 أسئلة خلال دقيقتين لكل سؤال</li>
        <li>احصل على تغذية راجعة فورية لكل إجابة</li>
        <li>اطبع شهادة تقدير عند النجاح بـ60% فأكثر</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
    <button class="about-back" onclick="goHome()">🏠 العودة للرئيسية</button>
  </div>

</div></div>

<!-- TEACHER MODAL -->
<div class="ov" id="m-teacher">
  <div class="md">
    <div class="mdt">🔐 لوحة تحكم المعلم</div>
    <div id="m-pa" class="pa">
      <p>أدخل كلمة المرور</p>
      <input type="password" id="m-pi" placeholder="••••" oninput="chkPass(this.value)" autocomplete="off">
    </div>
    <div id="m-pb" style="display:none">
      <div class="mr"><span class="ml">📊 إحصائيات الجلسة:</span><div class="stb" id="stb">لا توجد بيانات.</div></div>
      <div class="mdv"></div>
      <div class="mr">
        <span class="ml">✏️ تعديل سؤال:</span>
        <select class="msel" id="ed-cat" style="margin-bottom:6px">
          <option value="">— اختر القسم —</option>
          <option value="fahm">فهم المقروء</option>
          <option value="nahw">النحو والقواعد</option>
          <option value="imla">الإملاء</option>
          <option value="shir">النص الشعري</option>
        </select>
        <select class="msel" id="ed-qn" style="margin-bottom:6px">
          <option value="0">سؤال 1</option><option value="1">سؤال 2</option>
          <option value="2">سؤال 3</option><option value="3">سؤال 4</option><option value="4">سؤال 5</option>
        </select>
        <textarea class="mta" id="ed-tx" placeholder="نص السؤال الجديد..."></textarea>
        <div style="margin-top:7px">
          <button class="mbtn" onclick="saveEdit()">💾 حفظ</button>
          <button class="mcl" onclick="closeM('m-teacher')">✕ إغلاق</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="mdv"></div>
      <div class="mr">
        <span class="ml">🏆 إضافة طالب للشرف:</span>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:7px;flex-wrap:wrap">
          <input class="mi" id="hn-in" placeholder="الاسم" style="flex:1;min-width:110px">
          <input class="mi" id="hs-in" type="number" placeholder="%" style="width:70px">
          <button class="mbtn" onclick="addHonor()">إضافة</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- HONOR MODAL -->
<div class="ov" id="m-honor">
  <div class="md" style="max-width:400px">
    <div class="mdt">🏆 لوحة الشرف</div>
    <ul class="hl" id="hl"><li class="en">لا يوجد طلاب بعد</li></ul>
    <div style="text-align:center;margin-top:14px"><button class="mcl" onclick="closeM('m-honor')">✕ إغلاق</button></div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CERT MODAL -->
<div class="ov" id="m-cert">
  <div style="max-width:520px;width:100%">
    <div class="cp">
      <img class="ce" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="نسر">
      <div class="cauth">السلطة الوطنية الفلسطينية – وزارة التربية والتعليم العالي</div>
      <div class="ch">شهادة تقدير</div><div class="cl2"></div>
      <div class="cb2">تُمنح هذه الشهادة للطالب / الطالبة<br>
        <span class="cname" id="ct-nm">---</span><br>
        تقديراً لتفوقه/ا في لعبة درر العقد الفريد<br>
        <b>اللغة العربية – الصف الخامس</b>
      </div>
      <div class="csc">النتيجة: <b id="ct-sc">---</b></div>
      <div class="cdt" id="ct-dt">---</div>
      <div class="csig">
        <div>مدير المدرسة<br>أ. مؤيد سويطي<div class="csgl"></div></div>
        <div>إعداد المعلم<br>أ. خليل عطيلة<div class="csgl"></div></div>
        <div>المشرف التربوي<br>أ. موسى فرج الله<div class="csgl"></div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div style="text-align:center;margin-top:9px;display:flex;gap:7px;justify-content:center">
      <button class="mcl" onclick="closeM('m-cert')">✕ إغلاق</button>
      <button class="mbtn" onclick="window.print()">🖨️ طباعة</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<button class="fab" id="fbt" onclick="openTeacher()">🔐 المعلم</button>
<button class="fab" id="fbh" onclick="openM('m-honor')">🏆 الشرف</button>

<script>
// SECURITY
(function(){
  document.addEventListener('contextmenu',e=>e.preventDefault());
  document.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{if(e.key==='F12'||(e.ctrlKey&&e.shiftKey&&'IJC'.includes(e.key))||(e.ctrlKey&&e.key==='U')){e.preventDefault();return false}});
  setInterval(()=>{document.getElementById('dw').classList.toggle('show',window.outerWidth-window.innerWidth>160||window.outerHeight-window.innerHeight>160)},1000);
  document.addEventListener('copy',e=>{if(!['INPUT','TEXTAREA'].includes(document.activeElement.tagName))e.preventDefault()});
})();

// STARFIELD
(function(){
  const c=document.getElementById('cvs'),x=c.getContext('2d');let S=[];
  function rsz(){c.width=innerWidth;c.height=innerHeight;mkS()}
  function mkS(){S=[];for(let i=0;i<150;i++)S.push({x:Math.random()*c.width,y:Math.random()*c.height,r:Math.random()*1.3+.2,a:Math.random(),da:(Math.random()-.5)*.007,g:Math.random()>.75})}
  function drw(){x.clearRect(0,0,c.width,c.height);const g=x.createRadialGradient(c.width/2,0,0,c.width/2,c.height,c.height);g.addColorStop(0,'#0e1e34');g.addColorStop(.6,'#0b1220');g.addColorStop(1,'#060a14');x.fillStyle=g;x.fillRect(0,0,c.width,c.height);S.forEach(s=>{s.a+=s.da;if(s.a<.05||s.a>1)s.da*=-1;x.beginPath();x.arc(s.x,s.y,s.r,0,Math.PI*2);x.fillStyle=s.g?`rgba(201,151,58,${s.a})`:`rgba(255,255,255,${s.a*.6})`;x.fill()});requestAnimationFrame(drw)}
  window.addEventListener('resize',rsz);rsz();drw();
})();

// PASSWORD
const _PH=btoa('teacher1234');
function chkPass(v){if(btoa(v)===_PH){document.getElementById('m-pb').style.display='block';document.getElementById('m-pa').style.display='none';updStats()}}

// ══ CLOCK & DATE ══
function tick(){
  const d=new Date();
  const days=['الأحد','الاثنين','الثلاثاء','الأربعاء','الخميس','الجمعة','السبت'];
  const months=['يناير','فبراير','مارس','أبريل','مايو','يونيو','يوليو','أغسطس','سبتمبر','أكتوبر','نوفمبر','ديسمبر'];
  const h=String(d.getHours()).padStart(2,'0');
  const m=String(d.getMinutes()).padStart(2,'0');
  const s=String(d.getSeconds()).padStart(2,'0');
  const ampm=d.getHours()<12?'ص':'م';
  const dayN=days[d.getDay()];
  const dateStr=`${d.getDate()} ${months[d.getMonth()]} ${d.getFullYear()}`;
  document.getElementById('clk').innerHTML=
    `<span style="color:var(--gl)">📅 ${dayN} ${dateStr}</span>`+
    `<span style="color:var(--gold);margin:0 8px">|</span>`+
    `<span style="color:#f0c96a;font-weight:900;letter-spacing:1px">🕐 ${h}:${m}:${s} ${ampm}</span>`;
}
setInterval(tick,1000);tick();

// CATEGORIES CONFIG
const CATS=[
  {id:'fahm',name:'فهم المقروء',   icon:'📖',color:'#2980b9',desc:'الجذور وعرس ثلجي',     pc1:'#2980b9',pc2:'#1abc9c'},
  {id:'nahw',name:'النحو والقواعد',icon:'📐',color:'#27ae60',desc:'الضمة والفتحة والكسرة', pc1:'#27ae60',pc2:'#f1c40f'},
  {id:'imla',name:'الإملاء',       icon:'✏️',color:'#e67e22',desc:'النون والتنوين وألف المد',pc1:'#e67e22',pc2:'#e74c3c'},
  {id:'shir',name:'النص الشعري',  icon:'✨',color:'#9b59b6',desc:'قصيدة الثلج – فوّاز حجّو',pc1:'#9b59b6',pc2:'#c9973a'},
];

// QUESTIONS DATABASE
const Q={
 1:{
  fahm:[
    {y:'tf',q:'تتحدث قصة "الجذور" عن أهمية الشهرة والعمل الظاهر.',a:false,e:'خطأ، تتحدث عن العمل الخفي النافع كالجذور تحت الأرض.'},
    {y:'mc',q:'بماذا شبّه الكاتب من يعمل في الخفاء لمساعدة الآخرين؟',o:['الأوراق والثمار','الجذور تحت الأرض','الأغصان العالية','الجذع الصلب'],a:1,e:'الجذور رمز العمل الخفي النافع دون انتظار تقدير.'},
    {y:'tf',q:'الجذور تمنح الشجرة الماء والغذاء دون أن يلتفت إليها أحد.',a:true,e:'صحيح، هذه هي الفكرة المحورية لنص الجذور.'},
    {y:'mc',q:'في نص "عرس ثلجي"، كيف خرج الناس بعد توقف الثلوج؟',o:['بسرعة وتهور','بحذر وفرح','دون اهتمام','خائفين'],a:1,e:'خرجوا بحذر وفرح يستمتعون بجمال الثلج.'},

 }
};

// STATE
const S={lv:1,cat:null,catN:'',qs:[],idx:0,cor:0,pts:0,sessions:[],honors:[],sound:false,edits:{},tmr:null,tLeft:120};

// SCREENS
function show(id){document.querySelectorAll('.scr').forEach(s=>s.classList.remove('active'));document.getElementById(id).classList.add('active');stopTimer()}
function goHome(){show('s-welcome')}
function goCats(){buildCats();show('s-cats')}

// LEVEL
function pickLevel(lv){S.lv=lv;S.pts=0;document.getElementById('sv').textContent='0';document.getElementById('lv-lbl').textContent='المستوى '+lv;goCats()}

// CATEGORIES
function buildCats(){
  const g=document.getElementById('cat-grid');g.innerHTML='';
  CATS.forEach(c=>{
    const d=document.createElement('div');d.className='cat-card';d.style.setProperty('--cc',c.color);
    d.innerHTML=`<div class="lv-ind">مستوى ${S.lv}</div><span class="cat-icon">${c.icon}</span><div class="cat-name">${c.name}</div><div class="cat-desc">${c.desc}</div><div class="cat-badge">5 أسئلة</div>`;
    d.onclick=()=>startCat(c.id,c.name,c.pc1,c.pc2);g.appendChild(d);
  });
}

// GAME
function startCat(id,name,pc1,pc2){
  S.cat=id;S.catN=name;S.idx=0;S.cor=0;
  let qs=JSON.parse(JSON.stringify((Q[S.lv]&&Q[S.lv][id])||[]));
  if(S.edits[S.lv]&&S.edits[S.lv][id])S.edits[S.lv][id].forEach((t,i)=>{if(t&&qs[i])qs[i].q=t});
  S.qs=qs;document.getElementById('cr-cat').textContent=name;document.getElementById('cr-t').textContent=qs.length;
  document.getElementById('pf').style.setProperty('--pc1',pc1);document.getElementById('pf').style.setProperty('--pc2',pc2);
  show('s-question');renderQ();
}
function renderQ(){
  const q=S.qs[S.idx];if(!q){endCat();return}
  document.getElementById('pf').style.width=(S.idx/S.qs.length*100)+'%';
  document.getElementById('cr-n').textContent=S.idx+1;
  const L={tf:'صح أم خطأ',mc:'اختيار من متعدد',fill:'أملأ الفراغ'};
  const C={tf:'p-tf',mc:'p-mc',fill:'p-fi'};
  const pill=document.getElementById('qp');pill.textContent=L[q.y]||q.y;pill.className='qp '+(C[q.y]||'p-mc');
  document.getElementById('qt').textContent=q.q;
  const fb=document.getElementById('qfb');fb.style.display='none';fb.className='fb';
  document.getElementById('nb').style.display='none';
  const od=document.getElementById('qo');od.innerHTML='';
  if(q.y==='tf'){
    const r=document.createElement('div');r.className='tfr';
    const bt=document.createElement('button');bt.className='tfb tft';bt.textContent='✔ صحيح';bt.onclick=()=>ansTF(true,bt,r);
    const bf=document.createElement('button');bf.className='tfb tff';bf.textContent='✘ خطأ';bf.onclick=()=>ansTF(false,bf,r);
    r.append(bt,bf);od.appendChild(r);
  }else if(q.y==='mc'){
    const g=document.createElement('div');g.className='og';
    q.o.forEach((o,i)=>{const b=document.createElement('button');b.className='op';b.textContent=o;b.onclick=()=>ansMC(i,b,g);g.appendChild(b)});od.appendChild(g);
  }else{
    const w=document.createElement('div');w.className='fw';
    const inp=document.createElement('input');inp.type='text';inp.className='fi';inp.placeholder='اكتب إجابتك هنا...';inp.autocomplete='off';
    inp.onkeydown=e=>{if(e.key==='Enter')subFill(inp.value,inp)};
    const sb=document.createElement('button');sb.className='fsb';sb.textContent='تأكيد ✓';sb.onclick=()=>subFill(inp.value,inp);
    w.append(inp,sb);od.appendChild(w);
  }
  startTimer();
}
function ansTF(ans,btn,row){
  const q=S.qs[S.idx];stopTimer();row.querySelectorAll('.tfb').forEach(b=>b.disabled=true);
  const ok=ans===q.a;btn.classList.add(ok?'ok':'no');
  if(!ok)row.querySelectorAll('.tfb')[q.a?0:1].classList.add('ok');
  if(ok)gainPt();showFB(ok,q.e);
}
function ansMC(i,btn,grid){
  const q=S.qs[S.idx];stopTimer();grid.querySelectorAll('.op').forEach(b=>b.disabled=true);
  const ok=i===q.a;btn.classList.add(ok?'ok':'no');
  if(!ok)grid.querySelectorAll('.op')[q.a].classList.add('ok');
  if(ok)gainPt();showFB(ok,q.e);
}
function subFill(val,inp){
  const q=S.qs[S.idx];stopTimer();inp.disabled=true;if(inp.nextElementSibling)inp.nextElementSibling.disabled=true;
  const u=val.trim().toLowerCase(),a=q.a.toLowerCase();
  const aw=a.split(/\s+/),uw=u.split(/\s+/);
  const m=aw.filter(w=>uw.some(x=>x.includes(w)||w.includes(x))).length;
  const ok=m>=Math.ceil(aw.length*.6);inp.classList.add(ok?'ok':'no');
  if(ok)gainPt();showFB(ok,'النموذجية: '+q.a+' — '+q.e);
}
function gainPt(){
  S.cor++;S.pts+=S.lv*10;
  const pill=document.getElementById('sv');
  pill.textContent=S.pts;
  // Score pop animation
  const p=document.getElementById('sc-pill');
  p.classList.remove('score-pop');void p.offsetWidth;p.classList.add('score-pop');
  // Card flash green
  const qc=document.querySelector('.qc');
  if(qc){qc.classList.remove('flash-ok');void qc.offsetWidth;qc.classList.add('flash-ok');}
  playSound('ok');
}
function showFB(ok,txt){
  const fb=document.getElementById('qfb');fb.style.display='block';fb.className='fb '+(ok?'ok':'no');
  fb.textContent=(ok?'✅ أحسنت! ':'❌ خطأ! ')+txt;document.getElementById('nb').style.display='block';
  if(!ok){
    playSound('err');
    // Card flash red
    const qc=document.querySelector('.qc');
    if(qc){qc.classList.remove('flash-no');void qc.offsetWidth;qc.classList.add('flash-no');}
  }
}
function nextQ(){S.idx++;if(S.idx>=S.qs.length)endCat();else renderQ()}
function endCat(){
  stopTimer();const tot=S.qs.length,pct=Math.round(S.cor/tot*100);
  S.sessions.push({cat:S.catN,cor:S.cor,tot,pct,pts:S.pts});show('s-results');
  document.getElementById('rpct').textContent=pct;document.getElementById('rcor').textContent=S.cor;
  document.getElementById('rtot').textContent=tot;document.getElementById('rpts').textContent=S.pts;document.getElementById('rcat').textContent=S.catN;
  let t,st,ic;
  if(pct>=90){t='🌟 ممتاز جداً!';st='⭐⭐⭐';ic='🦅';confetti()}
  else if(pct>=75){t='👏 جيد جداً!';st='⭐⭐';ic='🎉'}
  else if(pct>=60){t='👍 جيد!';st='⭐';ic='💪'}
  else{t='💡 حاول مرة أخرى!';st='';ic='📚'}
  document.getElementById('rtt').textContent=t;document.getElementById('rstr').textContent=st;document.getElementById('ri').textContent=ic;
  playSound(pct>=60?'win':'err');
}

// ══ SOUND ENGINE ══
let AC=null,bgNode=null,bgGain=null,bgPlaying=false;
function getAC(){
  if(!AC){AC=new(window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext)();}
  if(AC.state==='suspended')AC.resume();
  return AC;
}

// Background music – oriental loop using oscillators
function startBGMusic(){
  if(bgPlaying||!S.sound)return;
  try{
    const ctx=getAC();
    bgGain=ctx.createGain();bgGain.gain.value=0.06;bgGain.connect(ctx.destination);
    // Pentatonic oriental melody loop
    const notes=[392,440,493,523,587,659,698,784];
    let t=ctx.currentTime;
    const loop=()=>{
      if(!bgPlaying)return;
      notes.forEach((freq,i)=>{
        const o=ctx.createOscillator(),g=ctx.createGain();
        o.type='sine';o.frequency.value=freq;
        o.connect(g);g.connect(bgGain);
        const st=t+i*0.28;
        g.gain.setValueAtTime(0,st);
        g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(0.6,st+0.05);
        g.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001,st+0.55);
        o.start(st);o.stop(st+0.6);
      });
      // Bass pulse
      [196,196,220,196].forEach((freq,i)=>{
        const o=ctx.createOscillator(),g=ctx.createGain();
        o.type='triangle';o.frequency.value=freq;
        o.connect(g);g.connect(bgGain);
        const st=t+i*0.56;
        g.gain.setValueAtTime(0,st);
        g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(0.4,st+0.02);
        g.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001,st+0.3);
        o.start(st);o.stop(st+0.35);
      });
      t+=notes.length*0.28+0.3;
    };
    bgPlaying=true;
    loop();
    S._bgLoop=setInterval(loop,notes.length*280+300);
  }catch(e){}
}
function stopBGMusic(){
  bgPlaying=false;
  clearInterval(S._bgLoop);
  if(bgGain)try{bgGain.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(0,getAC().currentTime+0.5)}catch(e){}
}

function playSound(t){
  if(!S.sound)return;
  try{
    const ctx=getAC();
    if(t==='ok'){
      // Rising triumphant arpeggio
      [[523,0],[659,.1],[784,.2],[1047,.32]].forEach(([f,d])=>{
        const o=ctx.createOscillator(),g=ctx.createGain(),panner=ctx.createStereoPanner();
        o.type='sine';o.frequency.value=f;
        o.connect(g);g.connect(panner);panner.connect(ctx.destination);
        panner.pan.value=(Math.random()-.5)*.4;
        g.gain.setValueAtTime(0,ctx.currentTime+d);
        g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(.25,ctx.currentTime+d+.03);
        g.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(.001,ctx.currentTime+d+.4);
        o.start(ctx.currentTime+d);o.stop(ctx.currentTime+d+.42);
      });
      // Sparkle on top
      setTimeout(()=>{
        try{
          const o=ctx.createOscillator(),g=ctx.createGain();
          o.type='sine';o.frequency.value=1568;
          o.connect(g);g.connect(ctx.destination);
          g.gain.setValueAtTime(.1,ctx.currentTime);
          g.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(.001,ctx.currentTime+.2);
          o.start();o.stop(ctx.currentTime+.2);
        }catch(e){}
      },420);
    }
    else if(t==='err'){
      // Descending wobble
      const o=ctx.createOscillator(),g=ctx.createGain();
      o.type='sawtooth';
      o.frequency.setValueAtTime(300,ctx.currentTime);
      o.frequency.linearRampToValueAtTime(120,ctx.currentTime+.4);
      o.connect(g);g.connect(ctx.destination);
      g.gain.setValueAtTime(.2,ctx.currentTime);
      g.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(.001,ctx.currentTime+.5);
      o.start();o.stop(ctx.currentTime+.5);
    }
    else if(t==='win'){
      // Full fanfare
      [[523,.0],[659,.1],[784,.2],[1047,.32],[1319,.46],[1568,.6]].forEach(([f,d])=>{
        const o=ctx.createOscillator(),g=ctx.createGain();
        o.type='sine';o.frequency.value=f;
        o.connect(g);g.connect(ctx.destination);
        g.gain.setValueAtTime(0,ctx.currentTime+d);
        g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(.22,ctx.currentTime+d+.04);
        g.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(.001,ctx.currentTime+d+.45);
        o.start(ctx.currentTime+d);o.stop(ctx.currentTime+d+.48);
      });
    }
    else if(t==='tick'){
      // Countdown tick (urgent)
      const o=ctx.createOscillator(),g=ctx.createGain();
      o.type='square';o.frequency.value=880;
      o.connect(g);g.connect(ctx.destination);
      g.gain.setValueAtTime(.08,ctx.currentTime);
      g.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(.001,ctx.currentTime+.06);
      o.start();o.stop(ctx.currentTime+.07);
    }
    else if(t==='danger'){
      // Heartbeat danger
      [[110,0],[110,.15]].forEach(([f,d])=>{
        const o=ctx.createOscillator(),g=ctx.createGain();
        o.type='sine';o.frequency.value=f;
        o.connect(g);g.connect(ctx.destination);
        g.gain.setValueAtTime(0,ctx.currentTime+d);
        g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(.3,ctx.currentTime+d+.03);
        g.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(.001,ctx.currentTime+d+.12);
        o.start(ctx.currentTime+d);o.stop(ctx.currentTime+d+.14);
      });
    }
    else if(t==='timeout'){
      // Game-over buzz
      [180,150,120].forEach((f,i)=>{
        const o=ctx.createOscillator(),g=ctx.createGain();
        o.type='sawtooth';o.frequency.value=f;
        o.connect(g);g.connect(ctx.destination);
        const st=ctx.currentTime+i*.2;
        g.gain.setValueAtTime(.25,st);g.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(.001,st+.18);
        o.start(st);o.stop(st+.2);
      });
    }
  }catch(e){}
}

function toggleSound(){
  S.sound=!S.sound;
  const btn=document.getElementById('snd-btn');
  btn.textContent=S.sound?'🔊 الأصوات':'🔇 الأصوات';
  btn.style.color=S.sound?'#27ae60':'var(--gl)';
  btn.style.borderColor=S.sound?'rgba(39,174,96,.38)':'rgba(201,151,58,.22)';
  if(S.sound){try{getAC();startBGMusic()}catch(e){}}
  else stopBGMusic();
}

// ══ TIMER ══
function startTimer(){
  S.tLeft=120;
  const arc=document.getElementById('ta'),tn=document.getElementById('tn'),tw=document.getElementById('tw');
  tw.style.display='flex';
  const C=94.2;
  arc.style.strokeDasharray=C;arc.style.strokeDashoffset=0;
  arc.style.stroke='var(--gold)';tn.style.color='var(--gold)';tn.textContent=120;
  // Restart bg music for new question
  if(S.sound){stopBGMusic();setTimeout(startBGMusic,100);}
  S.tmr=setInterval(()=>{
    S.tLeft--;
    tn.textContent=S.tLeft;
    arc.style.strokeDashoffset=C*(1-S.tLeft/120);
    // Urgency phases
    if(S.tLeft===30){
      tw.classList.add('warn');
      arc.style.stroke='#f39c12';tn.style.color='#f39c12';
    }
    if(S.tLeft===15){
      tw.classList.remove('warn');tw.classList.add('danger');
      arc.style.stroke='#e74c3c';tn.style.color='#e74c3c';
      playSound('danger');
    }
    if(S.tLeft>0&&S.tLeft<=10){
      playSound('tick');
      tn.style.opacity=S.tLeft%2===0?'1':'0.3';
    }
    if(S.tLeft<=0){
      stopTimer();
      playSound('timeout');
      const qc=document.querySelector('.qc');
      if(qc){qc.style.animation='shk 0.5s ease';setTimeout(()=>qc.style.animation='',600);}
      document.querySelectorAll('.op,.tfb,.fi,.fsb').forEach(e=>e.disabled=true);
      const q=S.qs[S.idx];
      showFB(false,'⏰ انتهى الوقت! '+(q?q.e:''));
    }
  },1000);
}
function stopTimer(){
  clearInterval(S.tmr);
  const tw=document.getElementById('tw');
  tw.style.display='none';
  tw.classList.remove('warn','danger');
  const tn=document.getElementById('tn');
  tn.style.animation='';tn.style.opacity='1';tn.style.fontSize='';
  stopBGMusic();
}

// CONFETTI
function confetti(){
  const cols=['#c9973a','#f0c96a','#27ae60','#2980b9','#e74c3c','#9b59b6'];
  for(let i=0;i<60;i++){const el=document.createElement('div');el.className='cnf';el.style.cssText=`left:${Math.random()*100}vw;--d:${1.5+Math.random()*2.5}s;--r:${Math.random()*720}deg;--x:${(Math.random()-.5)*80}px;background:${cols[~~(Math.random()*cols.length)]};border-radius:${Math.random()>.5?'50%':'2px'}`;document.body.appendChild(el);setTimeout(()=>el.remove(),4000)}
}

// CERT
function showCert(){
  const pct=document.getElementById('rpct').textContent;
  const name=prompt('اسم الطالب/ة:','الطالب المتميز')||'الطالب المتميز';
  document.getElementById('ct-nm').textContent=name;
  document.getElementById('ct-sc').textContent=pct+'%';
  document.getElementById('ct-dt').textContent='التاريخ: '+new Date().toLocaleDateString('ar-SA',{year:'numeric',month:'long',day:'numeric'});
  openM('m-cert');
}

// MODALS
function openM(id){document.getElementById(id).classList.add('open')}
function closeM(id){document.getElementById(id).classList.remove('open')}
document.querySelectorAll('.ov').forEach(m=>m.addEventListener('click',e=>{if(e.target===m)m.classList.remove('open')}));
function openTeacher(){document.getElementById('m-pi').value='';document.getElementById('m-pb').style.display='none';document.getElementById('m-pa').style.display='block';openM('m-teacher')}

// TEACHER
function updStats(){const el=document.getElementById('stb');if(!S.sessions.length){el.textContent='لا توجد بيانات.';return}el.innerHTML=S.sessions.map(s=>`<div><b>${s.cat}</b>: ${s.cor}/${s.tot} (${s.pct}%) — ${s.pts} نقطة</div>`).join('')}
function saveEdit(){
  const cat=document.getElementById('ed-cat').value,qn=parseInt(document.getElementById('ed-qn').value),tx=document.getElementById('ed-tx').value.trim();
  if(!cat||!tx){alert('يرجى اختيار القسم وكتابة النص.');return}
  if(!S.edits[S.lv])S.edits[S.lv]={};if(!S.edits[S.lv][cat])S.edits[S.lv][cat]=[];
  S.edits[S.lv][cat][qn]=tx;alert('✅ تم الحفظ!');
}

// Auto-unlock audio on first touch (mobile requirement)
document.addEventListener('touchstart',function initAudio(){
  try{getAC();}catch(e){}
  document.removeEventListener('touchstart',initAudio);
},{once:true});
document.addEventListener('click',function initAudioClick(){
  try{getAC();}catch(e){}
  document.removeEventListener('click',initAudioClick);
},{once:true});
function addHonor(){
  const name=document.getElementById('hn-in').value.trim(),score=parseInt(document.getElementById('hs-in').value)||0;
  if(!name){alert('يرجى إدخال الاسم.');return}
  S.honors.push({name,score});S.honors.sort((a,b)=>b.score-a.score);renderHonors();
  document.getElementById('hn-in').value='';document.getElementById('hs-in').value='';
}
function renderHonors(){
  const ul=document.getElementById('hl');if(!S.honors.length){ul.innerHTML='<li class="en">لا يوجد طلاب بعد</li>';return}
  const m=['🥇','🥈','🥉'];
  ul.innerHTML=S.honors.slice(0,10).map((h,i)=>`<li class="hli"><span class="hr2">${m[i]||i+1}</span><span class="hn">${h.name}</span><span class="hsc">${h.score}%</span></li>`).join('');
}
</script>
</body>
</html>
